title: Casa y objetos cotidianos
communication_goal: Usar casa y objetos cotidianos en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to casa y objetos cotidianos.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla casa y objetos cotidianos mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: Rooms and furniture
lessons.objective: Nombrar habitaciones y muebles básicos de una casa y ubicarlos con frases sencillas.

activities.prompt: You cook in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Kitchen es la habitación donde cocinas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la habitación relacionada con preparar comida.

activities.prompt: You sleep in a ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Bed es la cama donde duermes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el mueble usado para dormir.

activities.prompt: You sit on a ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Chair es una silla.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el mueble para sentarse.

activities.instruction: Une cada palabra con la habitación.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas objetos con sus habitaciones habituales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa dónde se usa normalmente cada objeto.

activities.prompt: is / sofa / the / living room / in / The
activities.correct_answer: The sofa is in the living room.
activities.feedback_correct: La oración usa objeto + is + lugar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con The sofa y termina con in the living room.

activities.prompt: My bedroom has a bed, a desk, and a small lamp. The desk is next to the bed.
activities.question: What is next to the bed?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice the desk is next to the bed.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última oración.

activities.instruction: Graba la lista y la frase.
activities.prompt: bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living room. The table is in the kitchen.
activities.feedback_correct: Los nombres de habitaciones se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica bathroom sin añadir una sílaba extra y marca living room como dos palabras.

activities.prompt: Our apartment has two bedrooms, one bathroom, a kitchen, and a living room. The living room has a sofa and a television.
activities.question: What is in the living room?
activities.feedback_correct: La última oración menciona los dos objetos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la información después de has in the living room.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences about your home. Name at least three rooms and one object in each room.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes describir habitaciones y objetos básicos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa There is/are o The object is in the room.

activities.instruction: Haz un recorrido por una casa.
activities.prompt: Give the AI a simple tour of your home. Show three rooms, name objects, and answer where-questions.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes describir tu casa y ubicar objetos básicos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te muestra una casa virtual y te ayuda a practicar cada habitación.

lessons.title: Where are the things?
lessons.objective: Preguntar y responder dónde están los objetos usando preposiciones básicas de lugar.

activities.prompt: The keys are ___ the table.
activities.feedback_correct: On indica que las llaves están sobre la mesa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa en un objeto que toca la superficie de la mesa.

activities.prompt: The shoes are ___ the bed.
activities.feedback_correct: Under indica que están debajo de la cama.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la palabra para una posición inferior.

activities.prompt: Where is the lamp?
options: It is next to the sofa.
activities.correct_answer: It is next to the sofa.
activities.feedback_correct: Where pregunta por ubicación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta con un lugar o preposición.

activities.instruction: Une cada preposición con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces las posiciones básicas de los objetos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Visualiza la relación entre el objeto y el lugar.

activities.prompt: the / where / remote / is / control
activities.feedback_correct: Where is pregunta por la ubicación de un objeto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Where is y añade el nombre del objeto.

activities.prompt: The phone is on the desk. The glasses are next to the phone, and the notebook is under the desk.
activities.question: Where are the glasses?
activities.feedback_correct: Las gafas están al lado del teléfono.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la segunda oración.

activities.prompt: Where is the book? It is on the table. Where are the shoes? They are under the bed.
evaluation_criteria: clear where is and where are
activities.feedback_correct: Las ubicaciones se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Distingue Where is para uno y Where are para varios objetos.

activities.instruction: Lee el mapa de la habitación y responde.
activities.prompt: The bed is next to the window. A small table is between the bed and the door. The lamp is on the table, and the backpack is under it.
activities.question: Where is the lamp?
options: Between the bed and the door.
activities.feedback_correct: The lamp is on the table.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración que empieza con The lamp.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences describing where objects are in one room. Use at least five different prepositions.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes ubicar varios objetos con precisión básica.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa singular/plural y elige la preposición según la posición.

activities.prompt: The AI cannot find five things in your home. Give location clues and answer follow-up questions until each item is found.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes dar instrucciones espaciales útiles en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA convierte cada error en una pista visual y te pide reformularla.

lessons.title: My home routine
lessons.objective: Describir espacios de la casa, objetos de uso diario y acciones sencillas que ocurren en ellos.

activities.prompt: You wash your hands in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Sink es el lavabo o fregadero.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el objeto donde normalmente lavas tus manos.

activities.prompt: I keep my clothes in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Wardrobe es el armario para la ropa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el mueble donde guardas prendas.

activities.prompt: Every morning, I ___.
activities.feedback_correct: El orden es sujeto + verbo + posesivo + objeto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca make antes de my bed.

activities.instruction: Une la acción con el lugar u objeto.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas acciones cotidianas con espacios de la casa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Imagina dónde realizas cada actividad.

activities.prompt: I make the breakfast in bedroom.
activities.correct_answer: I make breakfast in the kitchen.
activities.feedback_correct: Breakfast se prepara normalmente en the kitchen.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia la habitación y evita the antes de breakfast en este contexto.

activities.prompt: In the morning, I make my bed, take a shower, and have breakfast in the kitchen. Then I leave the house.
activities.question: Where does the speaker have breakfast?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice have breakfast in the kitchen.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la acción después de take a shower.

activities.instruction: Graba la rutina de la mañana.
activities.prompt: I make my bed. I take a shower. I have breakfast in the kitchen. I leave the house.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu rutina se entiende y las acciones están bien conectadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica las frases como grupos, no palabra por palabra.

activities.prompt: Luis lives in a small apartment. The kitchen is next to the living room. His desk is in the bedroom, beside the window. He studies there every evening.
activities.question: Where does Luis study?
options: At his desk in the bedroom.
activities.correct_answer: At his desk in the bedroom.
activities.feedback_correct: El texto relaciona el escritorio y la habitación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con studies there.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about what you do in different rooms at home. Include five objects and three location phrases.
activities.feedback_correct: Conectas habitaciones, objetos y acciones cotidianas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa in the, on the o next to the para ubicar cada acción u objeto.

activities.instruction: Pide ayuda a tu compañero de casa.
activities.prompt: You are sharing a house with the AI. Explain your morning routine, ask where household items are, and solve one small problem together.
success_criteria: uses five room or object words
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de actividades domésticas y pedir información útil.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa un plano sencillo de la casa y practica las frases que necesites.

lessons.title: Describe and find a home
lessons.objective: Integrar vocabulario de la casa, ubicaciones y rutinas para describir una vivienda y resolver situaciones prácticas.

activities.prompt: You wash clothes in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Laundry room es el cuarto donde lavas la ropa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la habitación relacionada con lavar ropa.

activities.prompt: The keys are ___ the drawer.
activities.feedback_correct: In indica que las llaves están dentro del cajón.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la preposición para algo que está dentro de un espacio.

activities.prompt: Which sentence is correct?
options: There is a lamp on the desk.
There are a lamp on the desk.
activities.correct_answer: There is a lamp on the desk.
activities.feedback_correct: Lamp es singular y la ubicación usa on the desk.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa There is para un objeto singular y añade la preposición.

activities.prompt: is / the / bathroom / next to / kitchen / The
activities.correct_answer: The bathroom is next to the kitchen.
activities.feedback_correct: La estructura es sujeto + is + preposición + lugar.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con The bathroom y termina con the kitchen.

activities.instruction: Une cada problema con la pregunta útil.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas necesidades reales con preguntas de ubicación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa qué objeto o habitación necesitas encontrar.

activities.prompt: First, you enter the living room. The sofa is opposite the television. The kitchen is behind the living room, and the bathroom is next to the bedroom.
activities.question: Where is the bathroom?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice the bathroom is next to the bedroom.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última parte de la descripción.

activities.prompt: This is my home. The sofa is in the living room. The kitchen is behind it. The bathroom is next to the bedroom.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu recorrido es claro y fácil de seguir.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Haz una pausa breve entre habitaciones y marca las preposiciones importantes.

activities.prompt: This house has three bedrooms, two bathrooms, a large kitchen, and a living room. There is a garden behind the house and a garage next to it.
activities.question: Where is the garage?
activities.feedback_correct: El anuncio dice the garage next to it; it se refiere a the house.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la última relación de ubicación del texto.

activities.prompt: Write a ten-sentence description of a house or apartment. Include rooms, furniture, five locations, and one daily activity in each of three rooms.
evaluation_criteria: at least five rooms or objects
activities.feedback_correct: Tu descripción permite imaginar y entender la vivienda.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa is/are, there is/are y las preposiciones de lugar.

activities.instruction: Busca una vivienda con la IA.
activities.prompt: You are visiting an apartment. Ask the AI where rooms and objects are, describe what you need, and decide if the apartment is suitable.
success_criteria: asks at least six location questions
uses at least eight home words
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes explorar una vivienda y tomar una decisión en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un plano y convierte cada error en una pista contextual.
